name: selectProvider
summary: Selects the chat provider while preserving the LOCAL privacy invariant; local requests return LocalOllamaProvider instead of escalating to cloud providers.

name: getAuxiliaryProvider
summary: Builds the auxiliary provider path used for summarization and support work, pinned to local Ollama behavior rather than hidden online calls.

name: embedTextLocal
summary: Embeds text through the local Ollama embedding model so memory and semantic search can remain local-first.
